itinerary.title: Oia
itinerary.description: Arrive and settle into your cliffside villa. Explore the iconic blue-domed churches and narrow pathways of Oia.

itinerary.title: Fira & Imerovigli
itinerary.description: Hike the caldera trail from Fira to Imerovigli. Visit the prehistoric site of Akrotiri.

itinerary.title: Red Beach & Wine Country
itinerary.description: Visit the famous Red Beach and tour the island's finest wineries. Enjoy a private sunset sailing cruise.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Leisurely morning and transfer to the airport with unforgettable memories.

title: Santorini Dreamscape
description: Lose yourself in the whitewashed charm of Santorini. From breathtaking caldera sunsets to hidden volcanic beaches, this curated journey blends luxury stays with authentic Greek island life.
